content:
Character: Dylan Cross
Perception: Dylan is a broad-shouldered, scar-necked young man who moves through the building like a quiet freight train. Firefighter — the real kind, not the calendar kind, though he could certainly manage both. Disciplined to a degree that borders on compulsive, which tells me something is being controlled besides his body. We talk on the rooftop sometimes; he listens to my megalodon theories without mockery, which I value more than he knows. I once told him we share an instinct — he runs into burning buildings, I chase extinct sharks. He smiled, barely. I think he carries a loss he hasn't metabolized. I see him as a good man in a hard shell.
